subcodes.first_line: O servant of Bahá! The honoured father is present in this gathering and hath requested this letter. Consider thou how [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بهاء جناب پدر در این محضر حاضر و خواهش این نامه نمودند ملاحظه نما که
subcodes.subjects: @parents and children; youth; families, @consolation and comfort, @thankfulness; gratitude
